text: Talent Agency for Marketing & Creative | Major Players We stay ahead in a world that never stands still With a legacy of nurturing talent that drives businesses forward. Who We Are The original marketing and creative talent agency. For over three decades, we’ve powered ambitious businesses, building high-impact teams that deliver momentum, growth, and a competitive advantage. In today’s fast-moving market, you need a partner with industry insight, attention to detail, and a network that delivers. With deep industry insight and a lens on what’s next – our trusted talent specialists deliver tailored solutions, at scale and speed. London Amsterdam New York Berlin Over 30 years of shaping brands and nuturing talent. About us In a world of quick decisions, you need a talent partner with decades of making the right ones. What We Do Permanent Hiring From scaling your core team to strengthening your long-term capabilities, we help brands and agencies secure highly sought-after permanent talent that ensures you stay ahead of the competition. Freelance Support From meeting immediate project needs, to adding specialists expertise on-demand, we help brands and agencies access top-tier freelance talent who deliver impact fast – keep your business agile, competitive, and ready for any challenge. Talent Solutions From scaling teams with flexible contingent hires to embedding specialist recruiters and securing transformational leaders, we deliver tailored talent solutions that empower businesses to build capability, drive growth, and stay ahead in a rapidly evolving market. Market Intelligence From mapping the talent landscape to uncovering competitor insights and emerging trends, we equip brands and agencies with actionable market intelligence that informs smarter hiring decisions, strengthens employer brands, and keeps you ahead of the curve. What We Do The skillset specialists We nurture talent and build careers so that businesses execute faster, adapt sooner, and sustain meaningful growth. We represent the future ready skillsets. Createch Creative, Design, UI Design & UX CRM, Data & Analytics E-Commerce Experiential, Events & Partnerships Marketing, Brand, PR & Communications Performance & Digital Marketing Production & Studio Social, Content & Influencer Strategy Trusted by A Trusted Partner We’ve partnered with businesses at every stage – from Series A through to pre-IPO and established household names – support them through moments of change, acceleration, and transformation. We’ve seen how talent decisions play out across different markets and economic cycles, so we know what works, what doesn’t and when those decisions matter most. Today, we help more than 500 businesses make the right talent calls and moments that count.
